summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete and cannot run. Missing SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 and fixtures/secrets-config.json (referenced in workflow but not provided). Workflow lacks required test harness to orchestrate `act` runs; instead embeds inline assertions, violating spec requirement that "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT" via separate harness. No act-result.txt artifact generated. PowerShell: missing Set-StrictMode and [CmdletBinding()] (conventions). Workflow duplicates fixture-loading logic (lines ~55-70 repeated at ~80-95); should factor into helper. Actionlint installed manually instead of using rhysd/actionlint-action@v1.
